raw_title: Navigating the AI Hype: Chinese Journalists’ Algorithmic Imaginaries and Role Perceptions in Reporting Emerging Technologies
title_en: Navigating the AI Hype: Chinese Journalists’ Algorithmic Imaginaries and Role Perceptions in Reporting Emerging Technologies
title_zh: 驾驭人工智能热潮：中国记者在报道新兴技术时的算法想象与角色认知
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨中国记者如何理解和应对人工智能等新兴技术，特别是他们对算法的看法以及对自己在报道这些技术时的角色认知。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how Chinese journalists understand and respond to emerging technologies like AI, focusing on their views of algorithms and their perceptions of their roles in reporting these technologies.
research_direction_zh: 研究媒体从业者在技术变革中的认知与适应，关注算法对新闻实践的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigates media professionals' cognition and adaptation in technological change, focusing on the impact of algorithms on journalism practices.
